name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: BPFtrace Unsafe Option Usage
notes:
This Building Block detects the usage of the unsafe bpftrace option.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Andreas Hunkeler (@Karneades)
SIGMA Title: BPFtrace Unsafe Option Usage
SIGMA Description: Detects the usage of the unsafe bpftrace option


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: BPFtrace Unsafe Option Usage on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%bpftrace' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%--unsafe%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: BPFtrace Unsafe Option Usage on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%bpftrace' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%--unsafe%' AQL filter query
